# New predicate checklist

```text
Predicate:
Owner:
Status:
```

- [ ] Predicate added to registry.
- [ ] Subject schema added.
- [ ] Circumstance schema added.
- [ ] Consequence profile assigned.
- [ ] Route derived from profile.
- [ ] Lifecycle class assigned.
- [ ] Effect signature declared.
- [ ] Planned impacts declared.
- [ ] Required witnesses declared.
- [ ] Required constraints/claims/leases declared.
- [ ] Barrier policy declared.
- [ ] Truth/projection policy declared.
- [ ] AuthZ requirements declared.
- [ ] Replay scenario added.
- [ ] Formal obligations added or explicit gap recorded.
- [ ] Coverage matrix updated.
- [ ] Adapter certification tests added if execution-bearing.
```
